title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between three and six words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

questions.firstSentence: The only reason I'm late is that there was a massive traffic jam.
questions.secondSentence: I wouldn't be late (1) _________ a massive traffic jam.

questions.firstSentence: It's impossible that you saw Sarah yesterday because she's abroad.
questions.secondSentence: You (1) _________ Sarah yesterday because she's abroad.

questions.firstSentence: I don't think you should tell him the news yet.
questions.secondSentence: You (1) _________ tell him the news yet.

questions.firstSentence: The manager said he would not tolerate such rude behavior anymore.
questions.secondSentence: The manager said he would no (1) _________ such rude behavior.

questions.firstSentence: If you need any help, please don't hesitate to ask.
questions.secondSentence: (1) _________ any help, please don't hesitate to ask.

questions.firstSentence: It was the first time I had ever flown in a private jet.
questions.secondSentence: I (1) _________ in a private jet before.
